meaning: n.装病以逃避责任者,装病的人
examples: The star guard didn't say he wanted to be traded or call the center a fat malingerer.
One night there was a heavy snowfall, and in the morning Pike, the malingerer , did not appear. He was securely hidden in his nest under a foot of snow.
But it shouldn't be designed to ferret out the one malingerer out of 10 at the expense of the other nine's procedural rights.
